title: ochna perriniana
intro: Ochna perriniana, also known as the bird's eye bush or Mickey mouse plant, is a flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae that is native to Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ochna perriniana include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and protect against certain diseases. Ochna perriniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies and formulations.
